The '''Rainbow Bridge''' was a [[Magic/Legends|magical]] phenomenon witnessed on [[Endor/Legends|Endor]], a forest [[Moon/Legends|moon]] orbiting the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Endor (planet)/Legends|Tana]]. It was created when the artifact known as the [[Bridge crystal]] was held toward [[Ibleam]], Endor's [[Star/Legends|sun]]. By shining through the prismatic [[Crystal/Legends|crystal]], sunlight would create a bridge that appeared to be made of rainbows. Although formed from refracted and reflected light rays, the rainbow managed to support people walking on it,<ref name="EW1" /> in a fashion similar to the technologies known as [[Plasma bridge/Legends|plasma bridges]]<ref name="Liberty on Ryloth">{{TCW|Liberty on Ryloth}}</ref> and [[laser bridge]]s.<ref name="STOR">''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]''</ref>
